name: Flower Kids' Wall Kids' Shelf - Pillowfort™
description: Bring personality and a pop of color to your kid's room with this Flower Wall Shelf from Pillowfort™. Constructed from FSC wood for effortless style and lovely warm texture, this decorative wall shelf features a blooming floral motif with a built-in shelf to add functionality.  Great for a bedroom or play room.  Be sure to follow weight capacity guidelines, do not overload.
